scenario.name: UAS - MD5+SHA256 auth challenge for REGISTER and INVITE
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 401 Unauthorized [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="testrealm@host.com", nonce="dcd98b7102dd2f0e8b11d0f600bfb0c093", algorithm=MD5, qop="auth", opaque="5ccc069c403ebaf9f0171e9517f40e41" WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="testrealm@host.com", nonce="ZaGxV2WhsCtREI2EsiD1LR0RYd", algorithm=SHA-256, qop="auth", opaque="5ccc069c403ebaf9f0171e9517f40e42" Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 407 Proxy Authentication Required [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Proxy-Authenticate: Digest realm="testrealm@host.com", nonce="dcd98b7102dd2f0e8b11d0f600bfb0c093", algorithm=MD5, qop="auth", opaque="5ccc069c403ebaf9f0171e9517f40e41" Proxy-Authenticate: Digest realm="testrealm@host.com", nonce="ZaGxV2WhsCtREI2EsiD1LR0RYd", algorithm=SHA-256, qop="auth", opaque="5ccc069c403ebaf9f0171e9517f40e42" Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user2 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv
